The '''Kashyyykian hunting armor''' was a form of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] used by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. This armor was developed to protect Wookiee [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] from extremely dangerous beasts found in the lowest reaches of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk's]] massive forests.<ref name="WA">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Wookiee%20Armor|text=Wookiee Armor}}</ref> The Kashyyykian hunting armor offered a high degree of protection against kinetic damage but lesser protection from energy-based weapons like [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="SWG:CU" /> The complete armor set comprised a chest plate with an included helmet, left & right biceps, left & right bracers and leggings.<ref name="SWG:P9.2" /> The armor combined functional protective coverings with trophies from past hunts.<ref name="WA" />

Two other models of Wookiee armors were the Kashyyykian [[Kashyyykian black mountain armor|black mountain]] and [[Kashyyykian ceremonial armor|ceremonial]] armors.<ref name="SWG:P9.2" />

Kashyyykian hunting armors were worn by the [[Rryatt Ceremonial Guard]] and the [[Isolationist Wookiees]].<ref name="SWG:RotW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Kashyyykian hunting armor appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:P9.2" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Kashyyykian hunting armor was added to the game with the [[W:c:swg:Update Notes: 27 July 04|Publish 9.2]] released on [[July 27]], [[2004]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 9: Secrets of the Force">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=62675|text=Publish 9: Secrets of the Force}}</ref>
